title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: A podcast episode examining economic questions around AGI including optimal taxation, wealth redistribution, and whether inequality can be constrained. Hosts Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discuss scenarios where better AI could paradoxically reduce AI's economic share, capital concentration, and integration challenges for humans in post-AGI economies.
